title: SARS-CoV-2 Antibody Responses in Infection-Naive or Previously Infected Individuals After 1 and 2 Doses of the BNT162b2 Vaccine.
author_string: Anderson, Mark, Stec, Michael, Rewane, Ayesan, Landay, Alan, Cloherty, Gavin et al.
abstract: This cohort study examines antibody responses in infection-naive and previously infected individuals after 1 and 2 doses of the BNT162b2 vaccine.
